title: cerasus pseudocerasus
intro: Cerasus pseudocerasus, also known as the Japanese apricot or Chinese plum, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of salicylic acid and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Cerasus pseudocerasus include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
